name: cabin
description: Cabin - The workspace for code reviewers

scripts.build:all: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/database && npm run build -w packages/git && npm run build -w packages/github && npm run build -w packages/workers && npm run build -w packages/providers && npm run build -w packages/review-engine && npm run build -w apps/desktop && npm run build -w packages/ui
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build -w apps/desktop && npm run start -w apps/desktop
